import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Menu, X, User, ShoppingCart, LogOut } from 'lucide-react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useUser } from '../contexts/UserContext'; const Navbar: React.FC = () => { const [isMenuOpen, setIsMenuOpen] = useState(false); const [isCartOpen, setIsCartOpen] = useState(false); const [cartItems, setCartItems] = useState(3); // Sample cart items count const { user, logout } = useUser(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); navigate('/'); }; const isAdmin = user?.role === 'contractor'; return (

DHARMASIKHARA

Master the Law, Embrace Justice

{/* Desktop Navigation */}
Home Scenarios Marketplace Dashboard Multiplayer Legal Analysis {isAdmin && ( Create Scenario )} About Contact
{/* Cart Icon */}
{/* Cart Dropdown */} {isCartOpen && (

Your Cart

Complex Criminal Trial Simulation

2990 points

Corporate Merger Negotiation

1990 points

Family Mediation Mastery

1490 points

Subtotal 6470 points
setIsCartOpen(false)}> setIsCartOpen(false)}>
)}
{/* User Profile */} {user ? (
{user.username}
) : ( <> Sign In )}
{/* Mobile menu button */}
{/* Mobile Navigation */} {isMenuOpen && (
setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Home setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Scenarios setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Marketplace setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Dashboard setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Multiplayer setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Legal Analysis {isAdmin && ( setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Create Scenario )} setIsMenuOpen(false)}>About setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Contact
{user ? (
{user.username}
) : ( <> setIsMenuOpen(false)}>Sign In setIsMenuOpen(false)}> )}
)} {/* Mobile Cart Dropdown */} {isCartOpen && !isMenuOpen && (

Your Cart

2990 points

Corporate Merger Negotiation

1990 points

Family Mediation Mastery

1490 points

Subtotal 6470 points
)}
); }; export default Navbar;
